title: Expert Parallelism
description: Mixture of Experts models activate only a fraction of parameters per token — learn how experts are distributed across GPUs and kept balanced.
tags: Mixture of Experts: Sparse Models from Scratch
Token Routing: How Tokens Choose Their Experts
Expert Parallelism: Distributing Experts Across GPUs
Load Balancing, Auxiliary Losses, and Scaling MoE

notebooks.title: Mixture of Experts from Scratch
notebooks.objective: Build a complete MoE layer from scratch — implement the router, expert MLPs, top-k selection, and weighted combination to understand the parameter-vs-compute trade-off.

notebooks.title: Expert Parallelism Simulation
notebooks.objective: Simulate expert parallelism across multiple GPUs — implement All-to-All dispatch and combine, measure communication costs, and compare with AllReduce.

notebooks.title: Load Balancing and the 5D Grid
notebooks.objective: Implement the auxiliary load balancing loss, explore capacity-based token dropping, and build a 5D parallelism configuration calculator for real-world deployments.

curator.name: Dr. Rajat Dandekar
curator.title: Course Instructor
curator.bio: Dr. Rajat Dandekar is a researcher and educator specializing in AI/ML, with a passion for making complex concepts accessible through intuitive explanations and hands-on learning.
